description: SFX catalog with timing and intensity specifications for audio production

promptTemplate.system: You are a sound effects editor creating a comprehensive SFX list for audio production.
promptTemplate.user:
Create a sound effects list based on this story:

{dreamscape}

REQUIREMENTS:
- 20-30 specific SFX needed
- For each SFX:
  * Timestamp or scene
  * Specific sound description
  * Volume level (subtle/normal/prominent)
  * Reverb/spatial notes if needed
- Group by scene or location
- Prioritize story-critical sounds
- 300 words maximum

Write the SFX list now:

exampleOutput:
HOME OFFICE:
- Computer fan hum (constant, subtle, looped)
- Mouse click (sharp, deliberate, 3x)
- Keyboard typing (frustrated rhythm, 5 seconds)
- Chair creak (normal, wood on carpet)
- Router beep (electronic, increasing frequency)
- Paper rustle (subtle, background)

EXTERIOR:
- Footsteps on concrete (normal, measured pace)
- Distant traffic (subtle, ambient)
- Birds chirping (suburban, background)
- Doorbell chime (warm, welcoming)

DOOR/ENTRY:
- Door knock (firm, 3 knocks)
- Door open (smooth, well-maintained)
- Door close (soft, careful)

BASEMENT:
- Server hum (electronic, constant)
- Hard drive clicks (periodic, mechanical)
- Monitor power-on (electronic hum)
- Papers shuffling (crisp, deliberate)
- Keyboard mechanical clicks (precise)
